title: Rampion 2 offshore wind farm extension project: development consent order Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for the construction and operation of an offshore wind farm electricity generating station, comprising the construction of up to 90 wind turbine generators, offshore substations, onshore and offshore cabling, onshore substation, and extension of the substation at Bolney.  Date of decision  4 April 2025  Company / location   Rampion Extension Development LimitedSwindonWiltshire   Type of project  Development consent order for an offshore wind farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  1200MW. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
